metadata.name: Infect — unblocked Glistener Elf gives poison counter to player instead of life loss
metadata.description: P1 controls Glistener Elf (1/1, Infect). P2 has no blockers. P1 attacks with Glistener Elf targeting P2. Glistener Elf deals 1 combat damage to P2 with Infect — CR 702.90b and 120.3b convert that damage to 1 poison counter instead of 1 life loss. After combat, P2 is at 40 life (unchanged) and has 1 poison counter. This is the core Infect mechanic: player damage bypasses life loss and gives poison counters.
metadata.generation_notes: Glistener Elf (card #105 in definitions.rs): {G}, Creature — Phyrexian Elf Warrior 1/1, Infect. Single-elf scenario to avoid duplicate-name harness limitation (find_on_battlefield returns lowest-ID match). P2 has no blockers so Glistener Elf is unblocked and deals 1 infect damage to P2 as a poison counter (CR 702.90b). P2 life remains 40 (no life loss). The -1/-1 counter path (CR 702.90c / 120.3d) is covered by unit tests in tests/keywords.rs.

script.step_note: P1 declares Glistener Elf as an attacker targeting P2. Glistener Elf taps (CR 508.1f). P2 has no blockers. All players pass priority.

actions.description: Initial: Glistener Elf (1/1, Infect) on P1 battlefield untapped; P2 at 40 life, 0 poison counters; stack empty
actions.note: Glistener Elf has Infect (CR 702.90). P2 has no blockers — Glistener Elf will deal unblocked combat damage to P2. Stack is empty.
CR 508.1: P1 declares Glistener Elf as an attacking creature targeting P2. CR 508.1f: Glistener Elf becomes tapped as part of attacking. Infect is a static ability — it does not trigger here.

actions.description: After declare_attackers: Glistener Elf is tapped; stack empty
actions.note: CR 508.1f: Glistener Elf tapped upon attacking. No triggered abilities from Infect at declare_attackers. Stack is empty.
CR 116.3: All players pass priority in APNAP order — advance to declare_blockers step.

script.step_note: P2 declares no blockers. Glistener Elf is unblocked (CR 509.1i) and will deal 1 infect damage directly to P2 as 1 poison counter (CR 702.90b, 120.3b).

actions.note: CR 509.1: P2 declares no blockers. Glistener Elf remains unblocked (CR 509.1i) — it will deal combat damage directly to P2.

actions.description: After declare_blockers: Glistener Elf still on P1 battlefield (tapped); P2 still at 40 life; stack empty
actions.note: No triggered abilities. Stack still empty. Combat damage will be dealt when all players pass priority.

CR 116.3: All players pass priority — advance to combat damage step. Glistener Elf (power 1, Infect, unblocked) deals 1 infect damage to P2. CR 702.90b: 1 infect damage to a player causes P2 to receive 1 poison counter instead of losing 1 life (CR 120.3b).

script.step_note: Combat damage step: Glistener Elf (1/1, Infect, unblocked) deals 1 infect damage to P2 — CR 702.90b converts it to 1 poison counter. P2 stays at 40 life.

actions.note: CR 704.3: SBAs checked after combat damage. P2 has 1 poison counter — below 10, so SBA 704.5c does not apply. Glistener Elf has 0 damage marked. No SBAs fire.
CR 116.3: All players pass priority after combat damage and SBA check. Stack is empty — advance to end of combat.

actions.description: Final state: P2 at 40 life (Infect replaced life loss with poison counter — CR 702.90b, 120.3b); P2 has 1 poison counter; Glistener Elf on P1 battlefield (tapped); stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.90b: Infect on Glistener Elf replaced the 1 combat damage to P2 with 1 poison counter — P2 life remains 40 (not 39). CR 120.3b confirms: no life loss, only poison counter given. P2 has 1 poison counter — below 10 so no game loss (CR 704.5c). Glistener Elf survives combat (dealt damage to player, not creature). Infect creature-damage path (CR 702.90c / 120.3d: -1/-1 counters instead of marked damage) is validated by unit tests in tests/keywords.rs.
